intended_use: LVivo platform is intended for non-invasive processing of ultrasound images to detect, measure, and calculate relevant medical parameters of structures and function of patients with suspected disease
intended_use_full: LVivo platform is intended for non-invasive processing of ultrasound images to detect, measure, and calculate relevant medical parameters of structures and function of patients with suspected disease and Age >18. In addition, it has the ability to provide Quality Score feedback.
target_condition: suspected cardiac and urinary pathology; left ventricular dysfunction, regional wall motion abnormalities
ground_truth: Wall Motion Score Index (WMSI) average across three cardiologists specializing in echocardiography
other_metrics: Pearson correlation coefficient: 0.89 (first validation set) and 0.856 (second validation set); ICC (Intraclass Correlation Coefficient) between ground truth and LVivo SWM: 0.85 (second set); Automated analysis success rate: 84% (139 of 166 exams processed)
